channel.title: Stillwater-Oakdale Civic Briefing
channel.description: A weekly Christian-worldview briefing on local government and schools across the Stillwater-to-Oakdale corridor — Washington County, Stillwater, Oakdale, and school districts ISD 834 and ISD 622. Hosted by Artie Fishel. Stay aware; stay engaged.
channel.itunes:author: Artie Fishel
channel.itunes:summary: A weekly Christian-worldview briefing on local government and schools across the Stillwater-to-Oakdale corridor — Washington County, Stillwater, Oakdale, and school districts ISD 834 and ISD 622. Hosted by Artie Fishel. Stay aware; stay engaged.

item.title: Civic Briefing — Week of July 6, 2026: Sports Fees, Road Money, and Oakdale Moves Out
item.description: Middle-school sports fees rise to about $200 a sport in Stillwater's district 834; Washington County lines up roughly $4 million in road-project decisions July 7 with public comment open; and Oakdale's City Hall and police lobby relocate for a year-and-a-half rebuild funded by a voter-approved sales tax. Plus a class-size change, two county comment windows closing this week, and where to show up. Hosted by Artie Fishel.
item.itunes:summary: Middle-school sports fees rise to about $200 a sport in Stillwater's district 834; Washington County lines up roughly $4 million in road-project decisions July 7 with public comment open; and Oakdale's City Hall and police lobby relocate for a year-and-a-half rebuild funded by a voter-approved sales tax. Plus a class-size change, two county comment windows closing this week, and where to show up. Hosted by Artie Fishel.
